parameters.subject: ={{ 'Auto-PO error on SO ' + String($('Prepare Sales Order ID').first().json.salesOrderId ?? '?') }}
parameters.message: ={{ 'Auto-PO automation hit an error and skipped this line.\n\nError: ' + String($json.error?.message ?? $json.message ?? JSON.stringify($json).slice(0, 500)) }}

parameters.content:
## 0. POLLING TRIGGER (THE REAL AUTO)

Striven has NO outbound webhooks, so the webhook alone never fires.

This branch polls new Sales Orders every 5 minutes and feeds one new SO per run into the same pipeline.

## GUARDS

Already Processed? = one SO can never create two POs.

Every Striven HTTP node now sends a browser User-Agent - without it Cloudflare blocks Striven API calls with error 1010.

## DEMO-ONLY PILOT

Only SOs whose type/name/customer contains DEMO or TEST pass through.

Go-live: delete this IF node (or route False into Extract) once testing is done.
